case_title: CAROLINA COLLAZOS CHAVARRO VS. SFO SHUTTLE INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-05-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CAROLINA COLLAZOS CHAVARRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEBRA SMITH, HR MANAGER. AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING EVIDENCE, IT WAS DETERMINED BY HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN THAT SFO SHUTTLE INC. IS NOT PROPER DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND THEIR CLAIM PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLAZOS CHAVARRO, CAROLINA AS TO DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-17-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF CAROLINA COLLAZOS CHAVORRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE BUS CO. INC. REPRESENTED BY GREGORY P. SPANN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE INC.
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,491.19 FILED BY COLLAZOS CHAVARRO, CAROLINA AS TO DEFENDANT SFO AIRPORTER INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,491.19 FILED BY COLLAZOS CHAVARRO, CAROLINA AS TO DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLAZOS CHAVARRO, CAROLINA
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
DECLARATION RE: RE: AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO CORRECT NAME OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLAZOS CHAVARRO, CAROLINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-27-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SFO AIRPORTER INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLAZOS CHAVARRO, CAROLINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SFO AIRPORTER INC. $3,650.42 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,740.42, I CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S PLAUSIBLE TESTIMONY OF HOW THE ACCIDENT OCCURRED. DEFENDANT'S ACCOUNT OF THE ACCIDENT IS NOT CONSISTENT WITH THE PHOTOGRAPHS OF DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-23-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
